body.title: Make _conn() respect IGOR_LOCAL_SEARCH_PATH env var
body.result: already implemented — _conn() reads IGOR_LOCAL_SEARCH_PATH at line 127; 14 watch_problems tests pass
body.description:
_conn() ignores IGOR_LOCAL_SEARCH_PATH, causing lever_watcher and other callers to hit the live instance.* schema during tests, polluting production data. Thread the env var through _conn() so tests can target a synthetic schema.

**Affected files:** wild_igor/igor/cognition/watch_problems.py (_conn definition), tests/test_watch_problems*.py
**Design rules:** no-sqlite; Postgres search_path set at connection time
**Scope boundary:** in scope: honor IGOR_LOCAL_SEARCH_PATH in _conn(); assert in lever_watcher test; verify fix resolves the known flaky watch_problems tests. Out of scope: refactoring connection pool, other _conn() callers outside watch_problems.
**Test plan:** unit test _conn() sets search_path to IGOR_LOCAL_SEARCH_PATH when set; existing flaky lever_watcher tests should pass without hitting live instance table after fix.
